content.fact_text: Implementation of the Order System Observability Controller, facilitating health check and metrics exposure for system monitoring.

provenance_data.behaviour: The controller provides two read-only endpoints: /health for infrastructure readiness probing and /metrics for Prometheus-compatible observability. It integrates with ProactiveHealthAuditor for status aggregation and registry for metric collection. It follows non-blocking async patterns and maps system states to HTTP status codes.
provenance_data.utility: Exposes essential monitoring data for the order interface layer, enabling production observability and load-balancer health probes.
